content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 2.3.9 WARN — PaywallView.swift:9 contains "Leave a 5-star review and get 1 week of Premium free!", a quid-pro-quo review incentive.
Pierre: Apple explicitly bans offering rewards in exchange for reviews or star ratings, since it manipulates App Store rankings and undermines trust in reviews. I found this exact pattern in `App/PaywallView.swift:9` tied directly to the premium unlock flow. Remove this line entirely and rely on the system `SKStoreReviewController`/`requestReview()` prompt without any reward tied to it.
